_doc: Fifth Edition (5ED) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/5ed.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 165C / 132U / 132R / 0M. Collation: US sequential, 10x11 sheets; Belgian striped. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: English printings from both USA and Belgium; both are 11C+3U+1R 15-card packs (36/box). US uses sequential collation, Belgian uses striped. No basic lands in boosters. No foils (pre-1999). Four basic-land art variations.
